dylan harper.web_narrative: Harper was cleared from the injury report ahead of Game 4 and played 21 minutes. His 7-point output fell short of the over 10 line due to inefficient shooting in limited minutes, not an injury exit in this game.

shai gilgeous-alexander.web_narrative: SGA finished with 19 points on 31 minutes, one short of the over 20 line. He suffered a left wrist/hand issue during the game but remained in action; the miss appears to reflect a difficult offensive night in a blowout loss rather than an injury exit.
